code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  mut total = 0
  mut cur = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line)
  while i <= n
    let b = if i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        32
      end
    else
      32
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if not string.is_empty(cur)
        let v = match string.parse_int(cur)
        when Some(x)
          x
        when None
          0
        end
        if v > 0
          total = total + v
        else if v < 0
          total = total - v
        end
        cur = ""
      end
    else
      cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println("r=#{total}")
end
